name: Weizmann Limited
summary: Weizmann Limited engages in the textile processing business in India. The company provides cotton voiles, pracales, and African prints. Weizmann Limited also exports its products primarily to Africa. The company was formerly known as Weizmann Industries Ltd and changed its name to Weizmann Limited in 1994. Weizmann Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Mumbai, India.
